meaning: n.美国北[南]卡罗莱纳州人
examples: The tall, slender, Carolinian forest provides a high canopy for the bustling forest bed.
It also means 170,000 North Carolinian will lose their federal extended benefit in July when the changes take effect.
The muscular, tattooed South Carolinian has a prized job with General Electric's (GE) Greenville Airfoils Facility in Piedmont, S.C.
How much money would your stimulus plan put in the pockets of the average South Carolinian?
Indeed, the courtly South Carolinian's 42-year tenure represents one-fifth of the Senate's own 208-year history.
